title: Representative Payee Services - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 15 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AVANTI ELDERCARE RESOURCES INC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides consultations and assessments for care and housing needs, evaluates financial and insurance resources, household and care management, monitoring/oversight, money management, and guardian and conservator services. Facilitates communication with health care providers, provides patient accompaniment to medical appointments, and home visits available for assessments and bill paying. "Just in Case" plan and estate-planning services also available. 911 Country Club Road Suite 250 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older with cognitive impairments, mental health challenges, brain injury, persons with complex health conditions, those who have been subject to financial or emotional abuse of an adult or elder, and persons who need help managing financial or health-care matters. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm or by appointment On call 24 hours per day / 7 days per week for urgent needs of established clients Email (541) 344-7712 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY ACTION PROGRAM OF EAST CENTRAL OREGON MAIN OFFICE CAPECO MONEY MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Representative Payee services. 211 SE Byers Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: -Oregon Money Management Program (OMMP): Age 18 and older and low-income -CAPECO Money Management Program (CMMP): Age 59 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm, Friday 8am-noon Email (541) 276-1926 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides payee services. 125 N 17th Street Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who receive federal and state benefits such as Social Security, Veterans Benefits, and Railroad Retirement Benefits. Priority is given to those with limited income and assets. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (503) 397-3511 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH & LAKE COMMUNITY ACTION SERVICES REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An organizational Representative Payee approved by the Social Security Administration (SSA) to receive Social Security benefits on a client’s behalf and issue payments for their monthly expenditures. 2316 South 6th Street Suite B Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Social Security recipients (SSD or SSI) or Veterans Beneficiaries Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm, closed all federal holidays Email (541) 882-3500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES EUGENE OFFICE OREGON MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides payee services. 1015 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: -Age 60 and older and enrolled with an ongoing Case Manager/Care Coordinator -Age 18 and older who have a documented disability and enrolled with an ongoing Case Manager/Care Coordinator Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 682-3353 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEIGHBORIMPACT BEND OFFICE REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Social Security Administration (SSA) approved representative payee services, receiving and managing disability benefits for clients. The program budgets and pays for essential living expenses such as housing, utilities, food, medical care, personal needs, and clothing, and saves any remaining funds in an interest-bearing account for future use. 20310 Empire Avenue Suite A100 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Age 18 and older and very low-income Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 548-2380 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEIGHBORIMPACT LA PINE OFFICE REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Social Security Administration (SSA) approved representative payee services, receiving and managing disability benefits for clients.
